ddls:
CREATE TABLE "park_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the park type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the park type */,
  "max_acreage" REAL /* Maximum acreage allowed for this type of park */,
  "min_acreage" REAL /* Minimum acreage allowed for this type of park */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer, more detailed description of the park type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_service_areas" (
  "psa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park service area */,
  "psa_name" TEXT /* Name of the park service area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the park service area */,
  "boundary_map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map showing the boundary of the park service area */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address for the park service area */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the park service area */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the park service area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisorial_districts" (
  "sd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisorial district */,
  "sd_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisorial district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supervisorial district */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map showing the boundary of the supervisorial district */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor for the district */,
  "supervisor_email" TEXT /* Email of the supervisor for the district */,
  "supervisor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supervisor for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., playground, athletic field, recreational building) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the facility (e.g., available, reserved, under maintenance) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance request */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person or team assigned to the request */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., visit, event, maintenance) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of people or events that used the park on the given date */,
  "usage_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the usage type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival, sports) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the event organizer */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_service_area_managers" (
  "psam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park service area manager */,
  "psa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park service area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the park service area manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the park service area manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the park service area manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the park service area */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager stopped managing the park service area (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the manager information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_service_area_managers_psa_id FOREIGN KEY ("psa_id") REFERENCES park_service_areas ("psa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities_maintenance" (
  "fm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., repair, replacement, inspection) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person or team assigned to the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., federal, state, local, private) */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the funding */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)
